description_long: This is a modern, rectangular cabinet or shelf unit with a light wood finish and a minimalist design. The structure features an open shelf running along the top and left side, creating a geometric frame. The front side displays six horizontal drawers with sleek, dark handles, providing ample storage space. The right side of the unit is open, while the left and back sides are fully enclosed with the same wood texture. The overall appearance is clean and contemporary, suitable for urban interiors such as lobbies, offices, or apartment common areas.
description: A modern, light wood cabinet with six drawers and an open shelf, featuring a minimalist geometric frame and dark handles.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the open shelf on top and left, with the main cabinet body below.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the solid wood panel with no visible drawers or handles.
description_view_2: Direct front view highlighting six drawers with dark handles and the open shelf above.
description_view_3: Right side view showing a solid wood panel and the open right side of the top shelf.
